_meta.description: General Orthodox media catalog — non-icon imagery (monasteries, frescoes, mosaics, manuscripts, landscapes, liturgical detail) used as accent/backdrop content throughout the app. Distinct from the saint-icon catalog at content/normalized/icons/catalog.json. Files live at public/media/ and are synced from content/raw/media/ via `npm run sync:media`.
_meta.license: Image files are public-domain, CC0, CC-BY, or CC-BY-SA. Each entry carries its own license + source + attribution.
_meta.status: Populated by scripts/ingest/media/fetch-media.ts — 2 images, PD/CC0 only. Last run 2026-05-24.
